subcodes.first_line: The affliction is not My imprisonment, nor the hardships that have befallen Me, but rather My affliction is to be found amidst those who know not [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لیس البلیه سجنی و ما ورد علی من المکاره بل البلیه ابتلائی بین الذین لایعرفون
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @wisdom [hikmat], @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @station of the Manifestation of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
